title: Chapter 130
content:
Okay, so before we begin, I kind of didn't plan on writing this chapter, the later part anyway. I don't know why I did, but I did. Let me know what you think of this. Alright. Enjoy...

~~

Chapter 130

Fire crackled as two figures sat around it. Both awkward, one could say, both more than the other, but only one of them was showing it, because the other one couldn’t show that because of their status.

“It is very cold…” One of them finally spoke, slightly exhausted from the awkward atmosphere.

“…It is.” The other one replied, awkward from their tone, but their face didn’t show any indication.

“It is.” Was all the first one could reply.

“…”

“…”

There was stifling silence once again, making the atmosphere even more awkward than before.

“H-how is Jack at his job?” Finally, Rayla couldn’t help but ask.

“He is good.” Zara simply replied, still a little awkward.

“That’s good.” Was all Rayla could say in reply.

“I see your other children are just as talented,” Zara spoke after some time, as if she also had had enough of the awkwardness.

“Yes. But Jack is more special than the others. Of course, as a mother, all my children are dear to me, but Jack has been a weak child since always, and still needs some form of my affection.” Rayla replied with a slight smile on her face.

A genuine smile.

Zara could see that. The smile of a mother. Zara, too, once knew how to smile that way. That was until she was dragged into a power struggle, and her children followed.

From then on, it was only those who were useful and those who were not. The motherly affection was gone.

She wished she could say that out loud, share her thoughts with another mother, and hopefully learn something from it, but she knew, as a noble, her status didn’t allow for that. She couldn’t show weakness in front of someone. Especially a commoner.

“Life must be very hard for you.” Rayla suddenly said, piercing through Zara’s thoughts.

“What?” Zara was stunned for a moment and couldn’t process what Rayla said.

“There was a time I was like that too. Afflicted.” Rayla said softly.

“What would you know?” Zara asked, slight annoyance in her tone, but she wasn’t upset.

Yet.

“I know enough.” Rayla kept it vague, but Zara could sense some sort of pain or history in her tone. Maybe both.

“You…” Zara was about to say something, but paused. She remained like that for a while before she finally asked, her voice soft but firm, “You had your mana circle destroyed, haven’t you?”

“…” Rayla didn’t reply. She just remained silent. But that silence was answer enough for a woman like Zara.

“You… used to be a noble…” Zara finally said.

Once again, her statement was met with nothing but silence. Rayla just kept looking at the fire that crackled every few seconds. The smile on her face wasn’t of regret or nostalgia. It was of relief.

“…”

Zara also didn’t say anything anymore. She knew she wouldn’t be getting anything more out of Rayla regarding that conversation.

“How did you do that?” Zara finally asked after some time, steering the conversation in another direction.

“Do what?” Rayla asked since the question was quite vague.

“That spell. How did you think to use the circle like that?” Zara asked.

“Oh, that. Jack taught me.” Rayla replied without hesitation.

“He did?” Zara was surprised. She thought it was a technique Rayla learned from her noble days, but that didn’t seem to be the case.

“Yes,” Rayla replied with a beaming smile.

“Jack has always been curious ever since he was a child. That curiosity of his led him to danger many times, but he also discovered many new things. Especially now.” Rayla kept on going, like a proud mother recounting her child’s accomplishments.

“I see.” Zara replied, before she asked, “What did you mean by the last part?”

“Ah, he’s been interested in female bodies these days. He has discovered many new and innovative methods to help me relax these days.” Rayla explained in detail.

“Is it the same way he relaxes me?” Zara asked.

“Eh? Y-you know how he does it?” Rayla asked, suddenly a little apprehensive.

“…” Zara narrowed her eyes for a while before she asked, “If you’re worried about me knowing about his penis, then do not worry. His condition is very advantageous to me, and I don’t intend to do anything that contradicts me.”

“Eh?” Rayla was once again surprised by that, but couldn’t say anything in return. She simply nodded and sighed after a while, “That’s a relief.”

“Does everyone in your family know?” Zara asked.

Rayla shook her head, “Except for Julian and Lucas, everyone else does.”

‘Only the women?’ Zara thought to herself, but dismissed it as trivial information the next moment and asked, “How are his techniques?”

“Oh, they’re divine.” Rayla instantly replied, her voice dripping with something that resembled joy.

‘That much?’ Zara was taken aback for a second, but then she remembered the sensation Jack’s penis provided her, and her vagina throbbed right at that moment.

“Un~”

“Is something the matter?” Rayla asked.

“No, it’s nothing big. It’s just that… remembering Jack’s penis has made my vagina itchy.” Zara replied.

“Oh,” Rayla said in return as if she perfectly understood.

“That means your vagina misses Jack’s penis. I have been through something similar many times.” Rayla added.

“Then how do you deal with it?” Zara asked.

“By using the method Jack taught me. It’s not as good as his, but it helps. Sometimes one of the girls helps me, or I do it myself.” Rayla answered.

“Can you teach me too? My vagina is itching with each passing moment, and I’m worried it might interfere with my ability to combat.” Zara said.

“Of course, but since I’m here, I’ll relieve it for you, and you will also see how it is done with one’s hand so you can do it on your own later,” Rayla replied as she stood up, making her way around the fire to Zara.

“Please raise your clothes,” Rayla asked, kneeling in front of Zara. Zara assumed the position she once assumed when Jack was about to use his hand as well.

Zara could somewhat tell what Rayla was going to do, since Jack had done it to her that many times before, but she was curious as to how it would feel if someone other than Jack were to do it.

“Here.” Rayla traced her fingers on Zara’s pussy slowly, from bottom to the top, going past her urethra and going for the throbbing part that made Zara the most excited.

“Hnnn~~”

Zara moaned again, a little louder this time, but what said she was truly enjoying it was the length of her moan.

Not only that…

“Unnggh!!”

She grunted as Rayla’s fingers entered her pussy. It hadn’t been long since her pussy had been stretched by Jack’s penis, but she could feel her walls constricting around Rayla’s fingers, not in an attempt to stop her, but to pull her in further.

“Aahhnnn~~”

She grabbed Rayla's wrist as Rayla began to move faster and faster, her fingers also in motion inside of her as if she was doing the come-hither motion, just like Jack had done.

She had to admit that the pleasure wasn’t on the same level as Jack, even when he used his fingers, not his penis, but she could still feel a lot from just this.

The itchiness she felt before was long gone, and what replaced it was pleasure. Pleasure that clouded her mind but also cleared the feelings of tension that had been bottled up for the past few days.

“HHHHAAANNN!!!”

She finally erupted on Rayla’s hand. She would have felt embarrassed, relieving herself in front of a commoner like that, but she could feel nothing of the sort at the moment.

Instead, she could feel a strange pull towards Rayla.

Rustle…

As she composed herself, she heard rustling of clothes and looked at Rayla, who was lying on her back on the ground, and had raised her skirt just like hers, displaying her vagina to Zara.

“My lady, seeing you like this has affected my vagina too. May I be so bold as to ask for your assistance?” Rayla asked, and while her tone was respectful, Zara could sense some authority she hadn’t sensed before.

“…”

She didn’t know what happened next. Her body moved on its own, and she was on all fours next, her head between Rayla’s knees. She could feel the musky scent from Rayla’s vagina, but instead of feeling apprehensive of it, she was drawn to it.

Although Rayla hadn’t specified how she wanted to be relieved, Zara didn’t ask. She simply lowered her head between her legs and brought out her pink tongue to lick Rayla’s vagina.

“Mmmph~~”

Rayla moaned instantly. A clear sign that Zara was doing her job well. Very well, actually, as compared to Rayla.

Slurp…

Forgetting about everything, Zara continued to do her job, soon bringing Rayla to the well-deserved climax for her services to the nobility. Especially the service she provided just earlier with her fingers.

“Mmmmm~~~”

“Mmmmmm…”

~~
